Property.Name: UnitOfMeasure_Text
Property.sap:label: Meas. Unit Text
Property.sap:quickinfo: Unit of Measurement Long Text with a 30-Character Maximum

Property.Name: UnitOfMeasureSAPCode
Property.sap:label: Internal SAP Code
Property.sap:quickinfo: Unit of Measurement, Internal SAP Code (No Conversion)

Property.Name: UnitOfMeasureISOCode
Property.sap:label: ISO Code
Property.sap:quickinfo: ISO Code for Unit of Measurement

Property.Name: IsPrimaryUnitForISOCode
Property.sap:label: Primary Code
Property.sap:quickinfo: Selection Field for Conversion from ISO Code to Int. Code

Property.Name: UnitOfMeasureNumberOfDecimals
Property.sap:label: Decimal Rounding
Property.sap:quickinfo: No. of Decimal Places for Rounding

Property.Name: SIUnitCnvrsnRateNumerator
Property.sap:quickinfo: Numerator for Conversion to SI Unit

Property.Name: SIUnitCnvrsnRateDenominator
Property.sap:quickinfo: Denominator for Conversion into SI Unit

Property.Name: SIUnitCnvrsnRateExponent
Property.sap:quickinfo: Base Ten Exponent for Conversion to SI Unit

Property.Name: SIUnitCnvrsnAdditiveValue
Property.sap:label: Additive Constant
Property.sap:quickinfo: Additive Constant for Conversion to SI Unit

Property.Name: UnitOfMeasureDspExponent
Property.sap:label: Exp. 10 Floating Pt
Property.sap:quickinfo: Exponent of 10 for Floating Point Format

Property.Name: UnitOfMeasureDspNmbrOfDcmls
Property.sap:label: Decimal Places
Property.sap:quickinfo: Number of Decimal Places for Number Display

Property.Name: LocalLastChangedAt
Property.sap:label: Local Last Changed At
Property.sap:quickinfo: Local Instance Last Change Date Time

Property.Name: LocalLastChangedAt
Property.sap:label: Local Last Changed At
Property.sap:quickinfo: Local Instance Last Change Date Time

Property.Name: LocalLastChangedAt
Property.sap:label: Changed On
Property.sap:quickinfo: Local Instance Last Change Date Time

Property.Name: LocalLastChangedAt
Property.sap:label: Changed On
Property.sap:quickinfo: Local Instance Last Change Date Time

Property.Name: LocalLastChangedAt
Property.sap:label: Changed On
Property.sap:quickinfo: Local Instance Last Change Date Time

Annotation.String: Setting the text direction-layout is supported
PDF supports setting the text direction-layout (e.g. left-to-right or right-to-left) in the document description
